title: Rolling Line
notes:
Launches to initial menu, but mouse is uncontrollable and keyboard does not work. 

Also appears to be running in software rendering mode (low resolution and high CPU usage).
Performance is fine, no tweaks required
title: Rolling Line

notes:
Desktop Gameplay is OK.
VR Untested.
Performance is good.
- All mouse events cause the camera to turn down and to the right slightly
- Steam engines do not have wheels
